title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 2 - Predicting (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's foundational introduction to computer science course, with Chapter 2 covering prediction techniques in artificial intelligence. Taught by Brian Yu and David J. Malan, the course is available through multiple platforms including edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
writeup: This CS50 session, taught by Brian Yu with David J. Malan, is Chapter 2 of Harvard's introductory artificial intelligence material, focused on prediction techniques. It frames prediction through deep learning and conformal prediction. The course is offered across edX, Harvard Extension School, and OpenCourseWare.
